description.p: SubnetDesk provides encrypted remote desktop access directly between devices on a LAN or routed VPN. It does not use rendezvous, relay, NAT traversal, cloud accounts, or public update services.

ul.li: Connect directly with an IP address or internal hostname.
Authenticate with one host-managed username and password.
Verify a persistent device fingerprint before credentials are sent.
Use desktop control and the retained native session tools without a cloud service.
